zh.lifeSummary: 當Hamon de Bellers of Kirby於1240年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾梅爾敦 莫布雷時，他的父親William Bellers24歲，母親Mabel d'Aungeuile20歲。他於大約1262年與Mabel Mansell在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1303年在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾梅爾敦 莫布雷享年63歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾梅爾敦 莫布雷。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hamon de Bellers of Kirby于1240年出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾梅爾敦 莫布雷时，他的父亲William Bellers24岁，母亲Mabel d'Aungeuile20岁。他于大约1262年与Mabel Mansell在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1303年在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾梅爾敦 莫布雷享年63岁，埋葬在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾梅爾敦 莫布雷。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bellers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Bellairs
meanings: English (Lincolnshire): variant of Bellars , suggesting French belle(s) aire(s) ‘lovely demeanor’.

variants.name: Bellars
meanings: (of Norman origin): apparently from Old French bélier ‘ram’, hence a nickname for someone thought to resemble a ram in some way or possibly a metonymic occupational name for a shepherd. In Northamptonshire the name attracts excrescent -s already by 1377.

nameMeanings.name: Hamon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pronounced ‘ay-mon’ Anglicized spelling of Irish Éamon(n) or Éaman(n), Irish forms of Edmund . Although it still has an essentially Irish flavour, the name was popularized throughout Britain in the 1950s due to the fame of the broadcaster Eamon Andrews ( 1922–87 ).

variants.name: Éamann
meanings: Pronounced ‘ay-mon’ Anglicized spelling of Irish Éamon(n) or Éaman(n), Irish forms of Edmund . Although it still has an essentially Irish flavour, the name was popularized throughout Britain in the 1950s due to the fame of the broadcaster Eamon Andrews ( 1922–87 ).

variants.name: Eamonn
meanings: Pronounced ‘ay-mon’ Anglicized spelling of Irish Éamon(n) or Éaman(n), Irish forms of Edmund . Although it still has an essentially Irish flavour, the name was popularized throughout Britain in the 1950s due to the fame of the broadcaster Eamon Andrews ( 1922–87 ).

variants.name: Eamon
meanings: Pronounced ‘ay-mon’ Anglicized spelling of Irish Éamon(n) or Éaman(n), Irish forms of Edmund . Although it still has an essentially Irish flavour, the name was popularized throughout Britain in the 1950s due to the fame of the broadcaster Eamon Andrews ( 1922–87 ).

variants.name: Éaman
meanings: Pronounced ‘ay-mon’ Anglicized spelling of Irish Éamon(n) or Éaman(n), Irish forms of Edmund . Although it still has an essentially Irish flavour, the name was popularized throughout Britain in the 1950s due to the fame of the broadcaster Eamon Andrews ( 1922–87 ).

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Hamon de Bellers of Kirby was born in 1240, in Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, England, his father, William Bellers, was 24 and his mother, Mabel d'Aungeuile, was 20. He married Mabel Mansell about 1262, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1303, in Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 63, and was buried in Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hamon de Bellers of Kirby est né en 1240, à Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, William Bellers, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Mabel d'Aungeuile, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Mabel Mansell environ 1262, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1303, à Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hamon de Bellers of Kirby 1240 in Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Bellers 24 und seine Mutter Mabel d'Aungeuile 20. Er hat um 1262 in England Mabel Mansell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1303 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Mabel Mansell circa 1262, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. ja.lifeSummary: Hamon de Bellers of Kirbyが1240年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアメルトン モウブレイで生まれた時，父William Bellersは24歳，母Mabel d'Aungeuileは20歳であった。約1262年にイギリスでMabel Mansellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1303年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアメルトン モウブレイで63歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアメルトン モウブレイにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hamon de Bellers of Kirby(이)가 1240년 영국 레이스스터실르 멜턴 모우브라이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Bellers(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Mabel d'Aungeuile(은)는 20세였다. 그는 대략 1262년 영국에서 Mabel Mansell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1303년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 멜턴 모우브라이에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 멜턴 모우브라이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hamon de Bellers of Kirby nasceu em 1240, em Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Bellers, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Mabel d'Aungeuile, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Mabel Mansell aproximadamente 1262, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1303, em Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 63 anos, e foi sepultado em Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hamon de Bellers of Kirby родился в 1240 г. в местности мелтон мавбрэи, лисестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Bellers было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Mabel d'Aungeuile, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Mabel Mansell около 1262 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1303 г. в местности мелтон мавбрэи, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности мелтон мавбрэи, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Mabel Mansell aproximadamente 1262, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo.
